rulings.Case Title: ALEXANDER GARCIA VS. DAVID O' KEEFFE AND KARI O'KEEFFE, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 23, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANTs MAKRAS REAL ESTATE, VICTOR MAKRAS, and FARAH MAKRAS's Motion For Attorney Fees GRANTED. No opposition filed.= (501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: GREGORY JAYSON VS. WAH CHACK LAU BYPASS TRUST, A TRUST. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 23, 2018 line 2. PLAINTIFF GREGORY JAYSON's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint GRANTED. Plaintiff shall file an amendment complaint no later than April 30, 2018. Amended complaint shall include factual allegations giving rise to request for punitive damages as to each defendant against whom Plaintiff is asserting punitive damages. All amendments shall be in bold font. = (501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: JERRY H. KU VS. ANNA KU WONG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 23, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANTs ANNA WONG, HELEN LEE, RENA CHIN, BEULAH KU, AVA KU, MELINDA LOW, HARRY FONG, and HAROLD FONG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to May 23, 2018 on Court's own motion. No later than May 18, 2018 parties to file a joint brief regarding the resolution/status of Petition to Vacate Fraudulently Obtained Court Orders. = (501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: JERRY H. KU VS. ANNA KU WONG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 23, 2018 line 3. No later than May 18, 2018 parties to file a joint brief regarding the resolution/status of Petition to Vacate Fraudulently Obtained Court Orders.= (501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID TORRES VS. GABRIELA MARIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 23, 2018 line 8. DEFENDANT GABRIELA MARIN and KATHERINE RUIZ's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Denied. Triable issue of fact re: number if units at the property. = (501/SRB)
